attempts.reflection: You need to build a crafting table first and then use it to craft a furnace. After obtaining a furnace, smelt iron ore into iron ingots and then craft the iron pickaxe. Use the iron pickaxe to mine more iron ore and cobblestone. Once you have enough iron ingots, craft an iron shovel. Finally, use the iron shovel to mine diamonds and craft the diamond shovel. Ensure you complete each step in the correct order and only proceed once you have all necessary materials and tools.

attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have the necessary materials and tools before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should first craft a crafting table, then use it to make a wooden pickaxe, followed by a furnace, and finally craft sticks and oak planks. After obtaining these, you can proceed to make a wooden shovel and then upgrade it to a diamond shovel. The failure was due to attempting to craft a furnace and wooden pickaxe without the required materials and tools, leading to an infinite loop of failed attempts. Correct the order and ensure you have all prerequisites before proceeding.
